title: Ultra-Scalable Event Pipeline: From Ingestion to Delivery

acts.title: Establishing
acts.summary: Wide view of the full pipeline: ingestion, queue, workers, storage, delivery.

acts.title: Ingestion & Queue
acts.summary: Events flow in via multiple streams; queue buffers and fans out.

acts.title: Processing at Scale
acts.summary: Replicated workers consume from the queue; cache layer reduces load.

acts.title: Storage & Delivery
acts.summary: Results land in warehouses; delivery tier fans out to consumers.

workflow_parts.name: Ingestion
workflow_parts.description: Multiple event streams enter the system (APIs, logs, IoT).
workflow_parts.responsibility: Accept, validate, and route incoming events.

workflow_parts.name: Queue
workflow_parts.description: Durable buffer between producers and workers.

workflow_parts.name: Workers
workflow_parts.description: Stateless processors that transform and enrich events.
workflow_parts.responsibility: Process events in parallel; scale horizontally.

workflow_parts.name: Cache
workflow_parts.description: Hot data layer to avoid repeated heavy lookups.
workflow_parts.responsibility: Reduce latency and load on storage.

workflow_parts.name: Storage
workflow_parts.responsibility: Persist and index for query and replay.

workflow_parts.name: Delivery
workflow_parts.description: Fan-out to subscribers, webhooks, and downstream systems.
workflow_parts.responsibility: Reliable delivery with retries and DLQ.

scenes.narration: From ingestion to delivery: a pipeline built to scale.
Six distinct parts: ingestion, queue, workers, cache, storage, and delivery.

elements.content: Events arrive via APIs, logs, and IoT streams
Validation and routing at the edge
Fan-out: one stream becomes many partitions

scenes.narration: Ingestion: events flow in from many sources and are fanned out to partitions.
The queue is sharded for throughput and isolation.

elements.content: Replicated workers pull from the queue
Each worker enriches and transforms events

scenes.narration: Workers are replicated: add more nodes to process more events.

elements.content: Cache layer: hot data in memory; cold in storage.

scenes.narration: A cache layer keeps hot data close and reduces load on storage.
Storage is sharded; delivery fans out to subscribers and webhooks.

elements.content: Ultra-scalable: every part can scale independently. Ingestion fans in, queue shards, workers replicate, cache replicates, storage shards, delivery fans out.

scenes.narration: Every part scales independently: that is what makes this pipeline ultra-scalable.
